_comment: Copy this file to tenant-config.local.json (git-ignored) and fill in your real values. known_tenants maps a tenant GUID to a display name shown in the Top customers leaderboard; exclude_from_leaderboard suppresses internal test/sandbox tenants from the leaderboard (they still count in portfolio totals). All GUIDs are matched case-insensitively. The placeholder GUIDs below are fake examples.
